headlines.headline: Calvos Genomics begins scheduled maintenance of supply chain optimization systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has negligible impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives for a business unit introduces significant uncertainty regarding the future structure and value of the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
